scenes.title: Retenzy: Shopify Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: Retenzy एक Shopify प्लेटफॉर्म है जो loyalty rewards, referrals, और reviews को मिलाकर, e-commerce brands के customer retention और LTV को बढ़ाता है।
scenes.visual: Animated graphic showing Shopify store connected to Loyalty, Referrals, and Reviews icons boosting LTV.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. Educational Illustration. Designed for College Students, 16:9 composition. Scene 1: Animated graphic showing Shopify store connected to Loyalty, Referrals, and Reviews icons boosting LTV.. Narration context: "Retenzy एक Shopify प्लेटफॉर्म है जो loyalty rewards, referrals, और reviews को मिलाकर, e-commerce brands के customer retention और LTV को बढ़ाता है।"
